name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, over-designed AI aesthetic.
problem: Most AI presentation tools generate visually cluttered or templated slides that look machine-made and undermine credibility. Chronicle 2.0 addresses the gap between fast AI generation and the quality finish that professional audiences expect. Teams waste hours reformatting AI output to meet brand and design standards.
useCases: Create investor pitch decks that look hand-crafted without hours of design work
Build client-facing proposal presentations with consistent brand polish
Produce internal strategy decks quickly without relying on a design team
Turn raw content or data into structured, visually coherent slide narratives
